# format: html5-token-v1
# note: input.html intentionally ends with a trailing newline byte
START name=html attrs=[] self_closing=false
START name=head attrs=[] self_closing=false
START name=style attrs=[] self_closing=false
CHAR text="body{content:\"</stylex><\\\\/style>\";}"
END name=style
END name=head
START name=body attrs=[] self_closing=false
START name=div attrs=[] self_closing=false
START name=em attrs=[] self_closing=false
CHAR text="ok"
END name=em
END name=div
END name=body
END name=html
CHAR text="\n"
EOF
